subcodes.first_line: O Leaf! We have heard thy call, and thy petition hath attained unto the hearing of the Desired One of all worlds. Blessed art thou [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای ورقه ندایت را شنیدیم و عریضه ات باصغاء مقصود عالمیان فائز طوبی از برای
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for women, @praise and encouragement, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @love of God
